body.title: [escalated] DickSimnel: track CC parity gaps as living document
body.result: Created docs/dicksimnel_parity.md with PARITY/PARTIAL/GAP mapping for all sprint-ticket steps and tools
body.intention: I intend that we always know exactly what CC can do that Dick cannot yet, so the gap is visible and shrinks intentionally.
body.description:
Create docs/dicksimnel_parity.md listing every sprint-ticket step with status: PARITY | PARTIAL | GAP. For each GAP, note the blocker and the ticket that will close it. Updated whenever a parity ticket ships.

Initial gap list from capability map:
  - memory_get → psql Bash wrapper (PARTIAL — works but verbose)
  - mcp__* tools (GAP — T-dicksimnel-mcp-wrappers, not yet filed)
  - /audit-precode, /audit-ticket sub-skills (GAP)
  - Agent/subagent spawn (GAP — not needed until escalation chain complete)
  - /savestate (GAP — not needed; DONE: is the signal)

**Affected files:** docs/dicksimnel_parity.md (new)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Create the doc; mark current state honestly. No implementation.
**Completion criteria:** docs/dicksimnel_parity.md exists with all sprint-ticket steps mapped to PARITY/PARTIAL/GAP; each GAP has a ticket reference or explicit 'not yet ticketed'.

## Escalation summary
**What was tried:** {"status": "done", "result": "Created docs/dicksimnel_parity.md with PARITY/PARTIAL/GAP mapping for all sprint-ticket steps and tools", "error_class": null, "error_number": null}
**Where it broke:** result missing DONE: prefix — not a completion
**What now?**
